variables.notes: R:c. Chose the current-section 'Debt to credit institutions' as the clean reported short-term debt line. Excluded lease liabilities per rule. Did not add 'LT Debt Maturing 1 Year' to avoid double counting since it likely overlaps with the current debt line.
